params.q: Search query (required, non-empty, q=* does NOT work)
params.skip: Number of results to skip (for pagination)
params.sort: Sort order: relevance, brand, brand+desc, price, price+desc
params.f: Facet filter, e.g. f=Breadcrumb:grocery/meat & seafood (only works with relevant search terms)

search.notes: q=* returns 0 results. Must use actual search terms. Breadcrumb filters only return results when the search term is relevant to that category.

product_detail.notes: Returns full product detail including nutrition, ingredients, pricing

stores.notes: Returns all 190 stores with addresses, coordinates, store IDs

store_name: Save-on-Foods, 19855 92a Ave, Langley Twp, BC V1M 3B6
authentication: NONE REQUIRED - fully public API, works with curl, no cookies/tokens needed

pagination.note: Error message 'Take too large. Take limit is 100.' if take > 100

anti_scraping.cloudflare_bot_management: Sets __cf_bm cookie but does not block requests
anti_scraping.note: Cloudflare sits in front but allows direct API access without challenge

approach_1_search_api.description: Use search API with category-specific search terms to enumerate products per department
approach_1_search_api.pros: Direct JSON API, no browser needed, fast, rich product data
approach_1_search_api.cons: Cannot enumerate ALL products - must craft relevant search queries per category. q=* doesn't work.
approach_1_search_api.implementation: For each leaf category, search with category-relevant terms (e.g., 'chicken' for chicken & turkey, 'bacon' for bacon, etc.). Paginate with skip/take. Then use product detail endpoint for nutrition/ingredients.

approach_2_ssr_scraping.description: Load category pages via browser/requests and extract __PRELOADED_STATE__ from HTML
approach_2_ssr_scraping.pros: Gets exact product listings as displayed on site, correct category assignments, all products in a category
approach_2_ssr_scraping.cons: Requires parsing HTML, SSR pages may have Cloudflare challenges, slower
approach_2_ssr_scraping.implementation: For each leaf category URL, fetch HTML, extract __PRELOADED_STATE__ JSON from script tag, parse search.productCardDictionary (leaf categories) or departments.productCardDictionary (parent categories).

recommended_scraping_strategy.recommended: Hybrid: Use approach_2 (SSR) to get all SKUs per category (complete coverage), then approach_1 (product detail API) to enrich with nutrition/ingredients data.
